leadText: Razor Shell (Japanese: シェルブレード Shell Blade) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation V. It was TM83 in Pokémon Sword and Shield.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Razor Shell inflicts damage and has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by one stage. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This attack may also lower the target's Defense stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This may also lower the target's Defense stat. S V The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It could also lower the enemy's Defense.
